_comment: Curated supporter-venue ground truth — see supporters.atlanta.json for schema. verified:false = needs a local confirmation pass before launch.

venues.name: The George & Dragon Pub
venues.note: Fremont English pub and a legendary Seattle soccer venue; opens at dawn for European fixtures, packed for England and World Cup matches.

venues.name: The Atlantic Crossing
venues.note: Roosevelt-area pub with a strong early-morning soccer following.

venues.name: Fadó Irish Pub
venues.note: Pioneer Square Irish pub; multi-screen internationals and Premier League, near the stadium district.
